label: session-ready
context: Continuation Demo session open in broadcast mode with Prompt me continuation policy
narration: Here we have a session open in broadcast mode, with the continuation policy set to Prompt me.

label: session-started
context: Continuation Demo session open in broadcast + Prompt me mode

label: message-sent
context: Question sent — both voices begin streaming round 1
narration: A question goes out to both voices at once, and they start streaming their responses side by side. Because we're in broadcast mode, every voice receives the same prompt simultaneously. Watch as each one takes its own approach — different reasoning, different style, arriving in real time.

label: round1-complete
context: Round 1 complete — continuation nudge banner appears
narration: Both voices have finished their first round. Notice the continuation nudge banner that just appeared — Polyphon is asking whether to let the conversation keep going.

label: nudge-visible
context: "Agents have more to say — let them continue?" nudge banner visible with Allow and Dismiss

label: allow-clicked
narration: Clicking Allow tells Polyphon to proceed, and round two kicks off immediately. Because the continuation policy is set to Prompt me, the app always pauses between rounds and waits for your go-ahead. This gives you a chance to read what came back, decide if you need more depth, and stay in control of the flow.

label: round2-complete
narration: Round two wraps up. Both voices have built on their earlier answers, and the conversation stops here until you say otherwise.
